rationale: Created deterministic project contract; no publishing action authorized.
Gabe approved the crypto-first Permission Afterparty direction, locked narration, 16:9 master, and full video build. Higgsfield is restricted to metaphor footage; product truth remains deterministic.
Repository baseline passed before production: 162 tests passed, 1 skipped; TypeScript build passed.

The generated location passed the mood and no-text gates. Its object failed wristband readability and the gate was indistinct, so the plate is retained only as an environment. Wristband, reader, and scanner ring move to deterministic composition. No paid variant was generated.

Captured the live WalletBrief wallet result, the current no-active state, and the already verified mainnet grant/revoke transactions. No new chain transaction was sent and no historical action is presented as a live button click.

The existing approved Gabe voice clone produced one continuous 40.921-second WAV for 4 credits. A transparent 1.03x tempo conformance produced a 39.731-second 48 kHz stereo working file without a paid variant.

Independent task review passed the six-frame deterministic compositor: exactly 1920x1080, 30 fps, 39 seconds, silent, historical proof explicitly separated from current live state. Human previs playback approval remains pending.

Gabe rejected the previs because it was a product slide sequence rather than an actor-led UGC/Seedance film. Retain it only as failure evidence. Reset to a locked cast, locations, prop, acted coverage, one short product insert, and a new cost gate.

The new eight-panel board reads as an actor-led film without product text: recurring lead, physical wristband plot, two locations, laptop interaction, and a resolved prop payoff. Seedance preflight is 91 credits for 720p tests and 234 credits for matching 1080p finals. No video job submitted.
